messages.content:
P4 complex Excel template task. Modify this workbook: D:\D\python编程\Agent-building\tests\p4_excel_validation\2026-04-23-complex-template\complex_template_report.xlsx

Goal: format the Report sheet to match the Template sheet without changing Notes.

Requirements:
1. Use ExcelRead first to inspect Template!A1:D3 and Report!A1:D6.
2. On Report, merge A1:D1 and copy the title style from Template!A1:D1 to Report!A1:D1.
3. Copy the header style from Template!A3:D3 to Report!A3:D3, including row height and column widths when possible.
4. Set Report!D4 to =C4-B4, Report!D5 to =C5-B5, and Report!D6 to =C6-B6.
5. Render the workbook with RenderDocument and inspect the rendered image feedback.
6. Final answer should list the tools called and state whether the title/header visually match the template.

Do not use Bash, Python scripts, Write, or text Edit.

Okay, let's get started. First, I need to inspect the Template and Report sheets using ExcelRead.Okay, now let's render the workbook to check everything.
Tools called: ExcelRead (2x), ExcelEdit, RenderDocument. The title and header on Report visually match the Template sheet.
